hero.title: Setting new standards in the LED display market together.
hero.description: Maximize your project success with German engineering, curated LED systems, and exclusive project protection — for demanding AV and digital signage installations.
hero.tagline: Save time. Eliminate risk. Scale your projects.

valueBlocks.title: Your Competitive Edge with ProLEDALL
valueBlocks.subtitle: ProLEDALL provides you with high-quality products, professional support, and powerful resources to help you grow your business.

blocks.title: Curated LED Portfolio
blocks.description: Instead of confusing mass-market products, you gain access to technically evaluated OEM systems from qualified manufacturers — vetted for quality, EMC compliance, and long-term reliability.

blocks.title: Engineering Made in Germany
blocks.description: We act as your external specialist department for LED system planning — from optoelectronic design and system architecture to mechanical integration and standards compliance assurance.

blocks.title: Real Project Protection
blocks.description: Register your projects exclusively with us — we guarantee full loyalty, protection against price dumping, and secure special conditions for your active projects throughout their lifecycle.

blocks.title: Demo Systems & Training
blocks.description: Access demo and test systems at attractive partner rates, alongside hands-on training in digital signage and LED video walls — so you can advise and convince clients on-site with confidence.

opportunities.title: We Strengthen Your Business
opportunities.subtitle: Whether you're an AV system integrator, signage specialist, or architect: ProLEDALL lets you add high-quality LED solutions to your portfolio — with no risk in purchasing or technical specialization.

cards.title: System Integrators
cards.description: Integrate ProLEDALL solutions seamlessly into your AV and digital signage projects.

cards.title: Signage Specialists
cards.description: Expand your portfolio with professional LED video walls and display solutions.

cards.title: Planners & Architects
cards.description: Deliver premium LED installations across construction and interior design projects.

cards.title: Distributors
cards.description: Distribute ProLEDALL products in your target markets and grow your business reach.

cards.title: Retailers & Resellers
cards.description: Sell ProLEDALL products through your existing retail channels and stores.

inquiry.title: Ready to join our network?
inquiry.description: Send us your inquiry — our team will get back to you within 48 hours for an initial conversation.
benefits: Access to technically evaluated OEM systems
Personal support from our engineering team
Demo & test systems at attractive partner rates
Technical training for digital signage & video walls
Competitive advantages in the European LED market

howTo.title: How to become a partner
howTo.subtitle: It's easy to join our partner network and start growing together.
howTo.ctaTitle: Ready to join our partner network?
howTo.ctaSubtitle: Submit your application today and take the first step towards a successful partnership.

steps.title: Submit application
steps.description: Fill out the partner application form with your company information.

steps.title: Review & approval
steps.description: Our team will review your application and get back to you.

steps.title: Partnership agreement
steps.description: Once approved, we'll set up our partnership terms and agreement.

steps.title: Grow together
steps.description: Access partner resources and start your journey with PROLEDALL.
